text.title: Post-Handover Warranty Runbook Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping runbook state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Does every step have an observable precondition?

branch.when: precond_missing == false AND actor_vague == false AND rollback_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: add rollback path or hard STOP

branch.when: precond_missing == false AND actor_vague == false AND rollback_missing == false AND budget_missing == true
precond_missing == false AND actor_vague == false AND rollback_missing == false AND budget_missing == false AND records_missing == true
precond_missing == false AND actor_vague == false AND rollback_missing == false AND budget_missing == false AND records_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: precond_missing=false, actor_vague=false, rollback_missing=false, budget_missing=false, records_missing=false → accept runbook.
